scripts.start: npm run sync:logo && npm run start:app
scripts.check: node --check main/main.js && node --check main/app_controller.js && node --check main/codex_runner.js && node --check renderer/app/state_i18n.js && node --check renderer/app/conversation_runtime.js && node --check renderer/app/renderers.js && node --check renderer/app/bootstrap.js
scripts.pack:dir: npm run sync:logo && npx electron-builder@26.0.12 --dir --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:deb: npm run sync:logo && npx electron-builder@26.0.12 --linux deb --config electron-builder.yml
